creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
pine4 fails to build.  reports this error during compilation:

cc -O -pipe -ffast-math -mfancy-math-387 -ffast-math -mfancy-math-387   -DDEBUG    -DBSDI -DSYSTYPE=\"BSF\" -DMOUSE -I/usr/local/include -c folder.c
cc -O -pipe -ffast-math -mfancy-math-387 -ffast-math -mfancy-math-387   -DDEBUG    -DBSDI -DSYSTYPE=\"BSF\" -DMOUSE -I/usr/local/include -c help.c
help.c: In function `get_supported_options':
help.c:735: `GET_SSLDRIVER' undeclared (first use in this function)
help.c:735: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
help.c:735: for each function it appears in.)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /amd/onceler/u/onceler1/usr/ports/mail/pine4/work/pine4.40/pine.

Links to executables are in bin directory:
/usr/libexec/elf/size: bin/pine: No such file or directory
   text    data     bss     dec     hex filename
 155639    5092    6492  167223   28d37 bin/pico
 153651    4964    6492  165107   284f3 bin/pilot
Done

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 	

cd /usr/ports/mail/pine4
pkg_delete cclient-*
pkg_delete pine4-*
make clean
make
